#nullable disable
namespace Sandbox.Game.Screens.ViewModels;

public class MyPlantManagementViewModel : MyViewModelBase
{
  private readonly IMyFarmPlotLogic m_farmPlotLogic;
  private MyInventory m_inventory;
  private ObservableCollection<MyInventoryItemModel> m_inventoryItems;
  private MyInventoryItemModel m_selectedInventoryItem;
  private string m_currentInventoryVolume;
  private string m_maxInventoryVolume;
  private string m_currentCropInformation;
  private string m_cropInfoBody;
  private string m_causeOfDeathText;
  private Brush m_causeOfDeathColor;
  private bool m_isCauseOfDeathVisible;
  private bool m_isPlantPlanted;
  private bool m_isSeedItemSelected;
  private bool m_isPlanting;
  private bool m_isHarvesting;
  private string m_plantHelpText;
  private string m_harvestHelpText;
  private string m_refreshHelpText;
  private string m_selectItemHelpText;
  private string m_backHelpText;
  private bool m_harvestButtonBlock = true;

  public ObservableCollection<MyInventoryItemModel> InventoryItems
  {
    get => this.m_inventoryItems;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<ObservableCollection<MyInventoryItemModel>>(ref this.m_inventoryItems, value, nameof (InventoryItems));
    }
  }

  public MyInventoryItemModel SelectedInventoryItem
  {
    get => this.m_selectedInventoryItem;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<MyInventoryItemModel>(ref this.m_selectedInventoryItem, value, nameof (SelectedInventoryItem));
      this.OnSelectedInventoryItemChanged();
    }
  }

  public string MaxInventoryVolume
  {
    get => this.m_maxInventoryVolume;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<string>(ref this.m_maxInventoryVolume, value, nameof (MaxInventoryVolume));
    }
  }

  public string CurrentInventoryVolume
  {
    get => this.m_currentInventoryVolume;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<string>(ref this.m_currentInventoryVolume, value, nameof (CurrentInventoryVolume));
    }
  }

  public string CurrentCropInformation
  {
    get => this.m_currentCropInformation;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<string>(ref this.m_currentCropInformation, value, nameof (CurrentCropInformation));
      this.ParseCropInformation(value);
    }
  }

  public string CropInfoBody
  {
    get => this.m_cropInfoBody;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<string>(ref this.m_cropInfoBody, value, nameof (CropInfoBody));
    }
  }

  public string CauseOfDeathText
  {
    get => this.m_causeOfDeathText;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<string>(ref this.m_causeOfDeathText, value, nameof (CauseOfDeathText));
    }
  }

  public Brush CauseOfDeathColor
  {
    get => this.m_causeOfDeathColor;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<Brush>(ref this.m_causeOfDeathColor, value, nameof (CauseOfDeathColor));
    }
  }

  public bool IsCauseOfDeathVisible
  {
    get => this.m_isCauseOfDeathVisible;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<bool>(ref this.m_isCauseOfDeathVisible, value, nameof (IsCauseOfDeathVisible));
    }
  }

  public bool IsPlantPlanted
  {
    get => this.m_isPlantPlanted;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<bool>(ref this.m_isPlantPlanted, value, nameof (IsPlantPlanted));
      ((BindableBase) this).RaisePropertyChanged("CanPlant");
      ((BindableBase) this).RaisePropertyChanged("CanHarvest");
    }
  }

  private bool IsSeedItemSelected
  {
    get => this.m_isSeedItemSelected;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<bool>(ref this.m_isSeedItemSelected, value, nameof (IsSeedItemSelected));
      ((BindableBase) this).RaisePropertyChanged("CanPlant");
    }
  }

  public bool CanPlant => this.IsSeedItemSelected && !this.IsPlantPlanted && !this.m_isPlanting;

  public bool CanHarvest => this.IsPlantPlanted && !this.m_isHarvesting;

  public bool IsPlanting
  {
    get => this.m_isPlanting;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<bool>(ref this.m_isPlanting, value, nameof (IsPlanting));
      ((BindableBase) this).RaisePropertyChanged("CanPlant");
    }
  }

  public bool IsHarvesting
  {
    get => this.m_isHarvesting;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<bool>(ref this.m_isHarvesting, value, nameof (IsHarvesting));
      ((BindableBase) this).RaisePropertyChanged("CanHarvest");
    }
  }

  public string PlantHelpText
  {
    get => this.m_plantHelpText;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<string>(ref this.m_plantHelpText, value, nameof (PlantHelpText));
    }
  }

  public string HarvestHelpText
  {
    get => this.m_harvestHelpText;
    set

      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<string>(ref this.m_harvestHelpText, value, nameof (HarvestHelpText));
    }

  public string RefreshHelpText
  {
    get => this.m_refreshHelpText;

    }

    }
  }

  public string BackHelpText
  {
    get => this.m_backHelpText;
    set
    {
      ((BindableBase) this).SetProperty<string>(ref this.m_backHelpText, value, nameof (BackHelpText));
    }
  }

  public ICommand PlantCommand { get; set; }

  public ICommand HarvestCommand { get; set; }

  public ICommand RefreshCommand { get; set; }

  private bool IsSelectedItemSeed
  {
    get
    {
      return this.SelectedInventoryItem != null && MyObjectBuilderType.op_Equality(MyInventoryItemExtension.GetDefinitionId((IMyInventoryItem) (object) this.SelectedInventoryItem.InventoryItem).TypeId, typeof (MyObjectBuilder_SeedItem));
    }
  }

  public MyPlantManagementViewModel(MyInventory inventory, IMyFarmPlotLogic farmPlotLogic)
    : base()
  {
    this.m_farmPlotLogic = farmPlotLogic;
    this.m_farmPlotLogic.OnPlantResult += new Action<bool>(this.OnPlantResult);
    this.m_farmPlotLogic.OnHarvestResult += new Action<bool>(this.OnHarvestResult);
    this.InventoryItems = new ObservableCollection<MyInventoryItemModel>();
    this.SetInventory(inventory);
    this.RefreshCurrentCropInformation();
    this.IsPlantPlanted = ((IMyFarmPlotLogic) farmPlotLogic).IsPlantPlanted;
    this.IsSeedItemSelected = false;
    this.PlantCommand = (ICommand) new RelayCommand(new Action<object>(this.OnPlant));
    this.HarvestCommand = (ICommand) new RelayCommand(new Action<object>(this.OnHarvest));
    this.RefreshCommand = (ICommand) new RelayCommand(new Action<object>(this.OnRefresh));
    MyInput.Static.OnJoystickLastUsedChanged += new Action(this.OnJoystickLastUsedChanged);
    this.UpdateHelpTexts();
  }

  public override void OnScreenClosed()
  {
    this.m_farmPlotLogic.OnPlantResult -= new Action<bool>(this.OnPlantResult);
    this.m_farmPlotLogic.OnHarvestResult -= new Action<bool>(this.OnHarvestResult);
    MyInput.Static.OnJoystickLastUsedChanged -= new Action(this.OnJoystickLastUsedChanged);
    base.OnScreenClosed();
  }

  private void OnJoystickLastUsedChanged() => this.UpdateHelpTexts();

  private void UpdateHelpTexts()
  {
    if (MyInput.Static.IsJoystickLastUsed)
    {
      this.PlantHelpText = MyTexts.GetString("PlantManagement_Help_Plant");
      this.HarvestHelpText = MyTexts.GetString("PlantManagement_Help_Harvest");
      this.RefreshHelpText = MyTexts.GetString("PlantManagement_Help_Refresh");
      this.SelectItemHelpText = MyTexts.GetString("PlantManagement_Help_SelectItem");
      this.BackHelpText = MyTexts.GetString("Gamepad_Help_Back");
    }
    else
    {
      this.PlantHelpText = string.Empty;
      this.HarvestHelpText = string.Empty;
      this.RefreshHelpText = string.Empty;
      this.SelectItemHelpText = string.Empty;
      this.BackHelpText = string.Empty;
    }
  }

  private void OnSelectedInventoryItemChanged()
  {
    this.IsSeedItemSelected = this.IsSelectedItemSeed;
  }

  private void SetInventory(MyInventory inventory)
  {
    this.UnsubscribeInventoryEvents();
    this.m_inventory = inventory;
    if (this.m_inventory != null)
    {
      this.m_inventory.InventoryContentChanged += new Action<MyInventoryBase, MyPhysicalInventoryItem, MyFixedPoint>(this.OnInventoryContentChanged);
      this.m_inventory.ContentsChanged += new Action<MyInventoryBase>(this.Inventory_ContentsChanged);
    }
    this.UpdateInventoryContent();
    this.UpdateVolumeText();
  }

  private void UnsubscribeInventoryEvents()
  {
    if (this.m_inventory == null)
      return;
    this.m_inventory.InventoryContentChanged -= new Action<MyInventoryBase, MyPhysicalInventoryItem, MyFixedPoint>(this.OnInventoryContentChanged);
    this.m_inventory.ContentsChanged -= new Action<MyInventoryBase>(this.Inventory_ContentsChanged);
  }

  private void OnInventoryContentChanged(
    MyInventoryBase inventory,
    MyPhysicalInventoryItem item,
    MyFixedPoint amount)
  {
    if (inventory != this.m_inventory)
      return;
    MyInventoryItemModel inventoryItemModel = (MyInventoryItemModel) null;
    bool flag = true;
    foreach (MyInventoryItemModel inventoryItem in (Collection<MyInventoryItemModel>) this.InventoryItems)
    {
      if (inventoryItem.Inventory == inventory && (int) item.ItemId == (int) inventoryItem.InventoryItem.ItemId)
      {
        if (MyFixedPoint.op_Equality(item.Amount, MyFixedPoint.op_Implicit(0)))
          inventoryItemModel = inventoryItem;
        else
          inventoryItem.Amount += MyFixedPoint.op_Explicit(amount);
        flag = false;
        break;
      }
    }
    if (flag)
      this.InventoryItems.Add(new MyInventoryItemModel(item, inventory));
    if (inventoryItemModel == null)
      return;
    this.InventoryItems.Remove(inventoryItemModel);
  }

  private void Inventory_ContentsChanged(MyInventoryBase inventory)
  {
    if (this.m_inventory != inventory)
      return;
    this.UpdateVolumeText();
  }

  private void UpdateInventoryContent()
  {
    List<MyInventoryItemModel> list = new List<MyInventoryItemModel>();
    if (this.m_inventory != null)
    {
      foreach (MyPhysicalInventoryItem inventoryItem in ((MyInventoryBase) this.m_inventory).GetItems())
      {
        MyInventoryItemModel inventoryItemModel = new MyInventoryItemModel(inventoryItem, (MyInventoryBase) this.m_inventory);
        list.Add(inventoryItemModel);
      }
    }
    this.InventoryItems = new ObservableCollection<MyInventoryItemModel>(list);
  }

  private void UpdateVolumeText()
  {
    if (this.m_inventory == null)
    {
      this.CurrentInventoryVolume = string.Empty;
      this.MaxInventoryVolume = string.Empty;
    }
    else
    {
      string format = MyTexts.GetString(MySpaceTexts.ScreenTerminalInventory_VolumeValue);
      MyInventory inventory;
      if (MySession.Static.CreativeMode && (inventory = this.m_inventory) != null && inventory.IsCharacterOwner)
      {
        this.CurrentInventoryVolume = string.Format(format, (object) MyValueFormatter.GetFormatedFloat(MyFixedPoint.op_Explicit(((MyInventoryBase) this.m_inventory).CurrentVolume) * 1000f, 2, ","));
        this.MaxInventoryVolume = MyTexts.GetString(MySpaceTexts.ScreenTerminalInventory_UnlimitedVolume);
      }
      else
      {
        this.CurrentInventoryVolume = string.Format(format, (object) MyValueFormatter.GetFormatedFloat(MyFixedPoint.op_Explicit(((MyInventoryBase) this.m_inventory).CurrentVolume) * 1000f, 2, ","));
        this.MaxInventoryVolume = string.Format(format, (object) MyValueFormatter.GetFormatedFloat(MyFixedPoint.op_Explicit(((MyInventoryBase) this.m_inventory).MaxVolume) * 1000f, 2, ","));
      }
    }
  }

  private void OnRefresh(object obj) => this.RefreshCurrentCropInformation();

  private void OnHarvest(object obj)
  {
    if (!this.CanHarvest || !((IMyFarmPlotLogic) this.m_farmPlotLogic).IsPlantPlanted)
      return;
    if (((IMyFarmPlotLogic) this.m_farmPlotLogic).IsAlive)
    {
      if (((IMyFarmPlotLogic) this.m_farmPlotLogic).IsPlantFullyGrown)
      {
        if (this.m_inventory.CanItemsBeAdded(MyFixedPoint.op_Implicit(((IMyFarmPlotLogic) this.m_farmPlotLogic).OutputItemAmount), ((IMyFarmPlotLogic) this.m_farmPlotLogic).OutputItem))
        {
          this.IsHarvesting = true;
          this.m_farmPlotLogic.Harvest();
        }
        else
          this.ShowMessageBoxOk(MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Caption_UnableToHarvest), MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Text_UnableToHarvest));
      }
      else
        this.ShowMessageBoxYesNo(MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Caption_NotFullyGrownWarning), MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Text_NotFullyGrownWarning), (Action<MyGuiScreenMessageBox.ResultEnum>) (answer =>
        {
          if (answer != null)
            return;
          this.RemovePlant();
        }));
    }
    else
      this.ShowMessageBoxOk(MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Caption_PlantDeadWarning), MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Text_PlantDeadWarning), (Action<MyGuiScreenMessageBox.ResultEnum>) (answer => this.RemovePlant()));
  }

  private void RemovePlant()
  {
    this.m_farmPlotLogic.RemovePlant(true);
    this.IsPlantPlanted = false;
  }

  private void OnPlant(object obj)
  {
    if (!this.CanPlant)
      return;
    if ((double) ((IMyFarmPlotLogic) this.m_farmPlotLogic).AmountOfSeedsRequired > (double) this.SelectedInventoryItem.Amount)
    {
      StringBuilder text = new StringBuilder();
      MyTexts.AppendFormat(text, MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Text_InsufficientSeedsWarning, (object) ((IMyFarmPlotLogic) this.m_farmPlotLogic).AmountOfSeedsRequired);
      this.ShowMessageBoxOk(MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Caption_InsufficientSeedsWarning), text);
    }
    else
    {
      this.IsPlanting = true;
      this.m_farmPlotLogic.PlantSeed((IMyInventoryItem) (object) this.SelectedInventoryItem.InventoryItem);
    }
  }

  private void RefreshCurrentCropInformation()
  {
    this.CurrentCropInformation = ((IMyFarmPlotLogic) this.m_farmPlotLogic).GetDetailedInfoWithoutRequiredInput();
  }

  private void OnPlantResult(bool success)
  {
    this.IsPlanting = false;
    if (!success)
      return;
    this.IsPlantPlanted = true;
    this.RefreshCurrentCropInformation();
  }

  private void OnHarvestResult(bool success)
  {
    this.IsHarvesting = false;
    if (success)
    {
      this.IsPlantPlanted = false;
      this.RefreshCurrentCropInformation();
    }
    else
      this.ShowMessageBoxOk(MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Caption_UnableToHarvest), MyTexts.Get(MySpaceTexts.MessageBox_Text_UnableToHarvest));
  }

  private void ParseCropInformation(string text)
  {
    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text))
    {
      this.CropInfoBody = string.Empty;
      this.IsCauseOfDeathVisible = false;
    }
    else
    {
      Match match = Regex.Match(text, "\\n\\n\\[Color=(#[0-9a-fA-F]{6,8})\\](.*?)\\[/Color\\]", RegexOptions.Singleline);
      if (match.Success)
      {
        this.CropInfoBody = text.Substring(0, match.Index).TrimEnd();
        string str1 = match.Groups[1].Value;
        this.CauseOfDeathText = match.Groups[2].Value.Trim();
        this.IsCauseOfDeathVisible = true;
        if (str1.Length == 9)
        {
          string str2 = str1.TrimStart('#');
          byte num = byte.Parse(str2.Substring(0, 2), NumberStyles.HexNumber);
          this.CauseOfDeathColor = (Brush) new SolidColorBrush(new ColorW((int) byte.Parse(str2.Substring(2, 2), NumberStyles.HexNumber), (int) byte.Parse(str2.Substring(4, 2), NumberStyles.HexNumber), (int) byte.Parse(str2.Substring(6, 2), NumberStyles.HexNumber), (int) num));
        }
        else
        {
          Color color = ColorExtensions.HexToColor(str1);
          this.CauseOfDeathColor = (Brush) new SolidColorBrush(new ColorW((int) ((Color) ref color).R, (int) ((Color) ref color).G, (int) ((Color) ref color).B, (int) ((Color) ref color).A));
        }
      }
      else
      {
        this.CropInfoBody = text;
        this.IsCauseOfDeathVisible = false;
      }
    }
  }

  public override void Update()
  {
    base.Update();
    if (MyControllerHelper.IsControl(MyControllerHelper.CX_GUI, MyControlsGUI.BUTTON_X, (MyControlStateType) 0, false, false))
    {
      if (this.m_harvestButtonBlock)
        this.m_harvestButtonBlock = false;
      else
        this.HarvestCommand.Execute((object) null);
    }
    else
      this.m_harvestButtonBlock = false;
  }
}
